tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ This strategic shift aims to address mounting financial pressures, enhance liquidity, and preserve long-term Bitcoin exposure, marking an evolution from its previous one-directional accumulation strategy.

tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ Strategy Inc. has launched a new capital strategy including selling Bitcoin for the first time since 2022, authorizing a $1 billion repurchase of its digital credit securities, and establishing a new framework for its preferred stock financing.
